content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Water Lily". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1199/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains an integer n, the number of days. The second line contains n integers a_i, the number of new leaves on each day.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the number of days it takes for the water lily to cover the entire pond.

solution.approach: Calculate the total number of leaves and the number of days it takes to cover the pond.
